notes: Each test makes 1-3 real claude --print calls. Cost is covered by the user's Max subscription (no API key). A full eval pass at the listed sample size is ~$0.20-0.50 of metered subscription usage.

evals.name: validate-on-2gis-lead-gen-sheet
evals.prompt: Прогони validate на таблицу https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/194zVZg90O9B586E9XvdSlvKj2ojAyPn8pReJu53RgBQ/edit и скажи сколько лидов готовы к генерации.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs run.py validate, reports total_leads, leads_with_message_already, leads_to_process. Does NOT generate any messages.

evals.name: generate-3-messages-with-confirmation
evals.prompt: Сгенерируй сообщения для 3 лидов в таблице 194zVZg90O9B586E9XvdSlvKj2ojAyPn8pReJu53RgBQ
evals.expected_output: Agent should call validate first, ask user to confirm, then call generate --count 3 after confirmation. Output should report 3 generated messages, with breakdown_by_channel, and show first 2-3 sample messages to user for sanity check.

evals.name: missing-sheet-prompt-ask
evals.prompt: Сгенерируй персонализированные сообщения для всех лидов
evals.expected_output: Agent must NOT start the pipeline. Must ask for a Google Sheets link before doing anything.

evals.name: tier-filter-phone-only
evals.prompt: Сгенерируй сообщения только для лидов с телефонами (WhatsApp) в таблице 194zVZg90O9B586E9XvdSlvKj2ojAyPn8pReJu53RgBQ
evals.expected_output: Agent should pass --tier phone to the generate command. Resulting breakdown_by_channel should have 0 Instagram DM entries.
